metadata.source: WITS / UN Comtrade trade and tariff source extract
metadata.elasticity_source: Legacy PE methodology note: WITS SMART weighted section elasticities from Kee, Nicita & Olarreaga (2008), applied as a correction to the precomputed uniform-elasticity baseline.

sections.name: Animal and Veg Fats and Oils
Raw Hides, Skins, Leather and Furs

partners.name: Соединенное Королевство Великобритании и Северной Ирландии

caveats.message: PE estimates direct import trade effects from tariff changes. It does not estimate GDP, inflation, employment, fiscal path, exchange-rate, I-O, CGE, or FPP effects.
The source PE data precomputes baseline effects at uniform elasticity 1.27; this public artifact applies documented HS-section elasticity correction factors.
Partner and regime filters use import-share scaling because the public artifact does not carry a full product-partner elasticity matrix.
